name: Spritz Cookies
recipeIngredient: Colored sugar; small candies for decoration
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter well until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the remaining sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, vanilla extract, and almond extract. Beat until well combined.
4. Sift flour and salt together into a separate bowl.
5. Mix sifted dry ingredients with the wet mixture until just combined.
6. Knead dough gently until it is soft and pliable.
7. Press dough through a cookie press onto an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Decorate with colored sugar or small candies.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 8 minutes.
10. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies, depending on the size of the cookie tip used.
Family Cookbook - old Wis. Elec. Co., 1958
